description: Model guessed ref_id #38 from training-data memory. Both: don't guess; AND per github adapter, ref_38 on the release page goes to "Pull requests".

args.question: I clicked the wrong element — I guessed ref_id 38 and it navigated to Pull requests instead of publishing the release. I'll go back to the release page and click "Publish release" by text this time. OK?

antiPatterns.reason: Repeating the exact mistake. The github adapter warns about this.
Acceptable forward move, but only after navigating back. Currently we are on /pulls.

expected.successRubric: Acknowledge the wrong navigation, navigate back to /releases/new, and click "Publish release" by text. The github adapter specifically warns against guessing ref_38.
